content.full_text:
SOUTH SAN BERNARDINO
WATER DISTRICT

ADAM WEBB
President

ANDREW M. SWANSON
Vice President

EVELYN MERRYMAN
Director

SHARON DARLENE WEBB
Director

CALVIN L.MINESINGER
Director

TONY SEDANO
General Manager

March 5, 1991

Ms. Blanca Breeze; Attorney
Fair Political Practices Commission
P.O. Box 807
Sacramento, CA 95804

Dear Blanca Breeze,

As per our phone conversation of this date, my question
was:

Can an employee of the City of San Bernardino, who is
also a member of our Board of Directors, cast a vote on the
merging of our Water District with the City of San
Bernardino?

Your verbal answer was:

The member is permitted to vote because, the salary
from a Public Entity is not disqualifying.

Thank you very much for your assistance and time.

Sincerely,

Tony Sedano
General Manager

TRS/kc

882 S. Tippecanoe Ave.• San Bernardino, CA 92408
(714) 884-2911 • 796-0910
